en.title: Secure Mobile Center
en.description: Participated in designing and implementing secure mobile systems, supported by Singapore National Research Foundation (NRF) with S$6,415,200 (NCR Award Number NRF2014NCR-NCR001-012).

cn.title: 安全移动中心 (Secure Mobile Center)
cn.description: 参与设计并实现安全移动系统，该项目由新加坡国家研究基金会 (NRF) 资助，资助金额为 6,415,200 新币 (项目编号：NRF2014NCR-NCR001-012)。

en.title: A new construction for linkable secret handshake
en.description: Cooperate in experiment using Java. The paper was published in Computer Journal, 2020.

cn.title: 可链接秘密握手的新型构造 (A new construction for linkable secret handshake)
cn.description: 负责基于 Java 的实验实现。论文发表于 Computer Journal, 2020。

en.title: Lightning-Fast and Privacy-Preserving Outsourced Computation in the Cloud
en.description: Cooperate in experiment using C language and SGX. The paper was published in Cybersecurity, 2020.

cn.title: 云端极速且隐私保护的外包计算 (Lightning-Fast and Privacy-Preserving Outsourced Computation in the Cloud)
cn.description: 负责基于 C 语言和 SGX 的实验实现。论文发表于 Cybersecurity, 2020。

en.title: Anonymous Asynchronous Payment Channel from k-Time Accountable Assertion
en.description: Cooperate in experiment using Java. The paper was published in Cryptology and Network Security: 18th International Conference, CANS 2019.

cn.title: 基于 k 次可追责断言的匿名异步支付通道 (Anonymous Asynchronous Payment Channel from k-Time Accountable Assertion)
cn.description: 负责基于 Java 的实验实现。论文发表于第18届国际密码学与网络安全会议 (CANS 2019)。

en.title: Privacy-Preserving Reinforcement Learning Design for Patient-Centric Dynamic Treatment Regimes
en.description: Cooperate in experiment using C. The paper was published in IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computing, 2019.

cn.title: 以患者为中心的动态治疗方案隐私保护强化学习设计 (Privacy-Preserving Reinforcement Learning Design for Patient-Centric Dynamic Treatment Regimes)
cn.description: 负责基于 C 语言的实验实现。论文发表于 IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computing, 2019。

en.title: Lightweight Attribute-based Keyword Search with Policy Protection for Cloud-assisted IoT
en.description: Cooperate in experiment using Java. The paper was published in IEEE Conference on Dependable and Secure Computing, 2019.

cn.title: 面向云辅助物联网的具有策略保护的轻量级属性基关键词检索 (Lightweight Attribute-based Keyword Search with Policy Protection for Cloud-assisted IoT)
cn.description: 负责基于 Java 的实验实现。论文发表于 IEEE Conference on Dependable and Secure Computing, 2019。

en.title: A secure cloud sharing system based on outsourced CP-ABE
en.description: Designed and implemented a secure cloud file sharing system based on outsourced CP-ABE in C and Python on Ubuntu/Windows/Android.

cn.title: 基于外包 CP-ABE 的安全云共享系统 (A secure cloud sharing system based on outsourced CP-ABE)
cn.description: 在 Ubuntu/Windows/Android 平台上使用 C 和 Python 设计并实现了一个基于外包 CP-ABE 的安全云文件共享系统。

en.title: A secure messaging system based on outsourced CP-ABE
en.description: Designed and implemented a secure message system based on outsourced CP-ABE in C and Java on Ubuntu/Windows/Android.

cn.title: 基于外包 CP-ABE 的安全即时通讯系统 (A secure instant messaging system based on outsourced CP-ABE)
cn.description: 在 Ubuntu/Windows/Android 平台上使用 C 和 Java 设计并实现了一个基于外包 CP-ABE 的安全即时通讯系统。

en.title: SecBook, a secure document real-time collaboration application online
en.description: Designed and implemented a secure document real-time collaboration application web application using Java, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS, and worked with AWS EC2.

cn.title: SecBook，在线安全文档实时协作应用 (SecBook, a secure document real-time collaboration application online)
cn.description: 使用 Java, JavaScript, HTML 和 CSS 设计并实现了一个安全文档实时协作 Web 应用，并部署于 AWS EC2。

en.title: Realtime Invention (Beijing) official website
en.description: Designed and implemented an official website for RTI in both English and Chinese using HTML, JavaScript, and CSS, deployed by AWS S3.

cn.title: 实创时新 (Realtime Invention)（北京）科技有限公司的官方网站
cn.description: 使用 HTML, JavaScript 和 CSS 为 RTI 设计并实现了中英文双语官方网站，通过 AWS S3 部署。
